debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
x : PersistenceSubmodule M
hx : x ∈ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN
a : PersistenceSubmodule M
ha : a ≤ x
ha' : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})
⊢ a ≤ ⊥

proof:
haveI : IsModularLattice (∀ i : C, Submodule K (M.obj i)) :=
      ⟨fun {x} y {z} (h : x ≤ z) (i : C) =>
        IsModularLattice.sup_inf_le_assoc_of_le (y i) (h i)⟩
    haveI : IsModularLattice (PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
      constructor; intro x y z h
      change ⇑((x ⊔ y) ⊓ z) ≤ ⇑(x ⊔ y ⊓ z)
      simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.coe_sup, PersistenceSubmodule.coe_inf]
      exact IsModularLattice.sup_inf_le_assoc_of_le (⇑y) h
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N₀, hN₀, hx_mem⟩ := hx
    have hxN₀ : x ≤ N₀ := by rw [hB N₀ hN₀]; exact le_sSup hx_mem
    have hle : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤
        sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N₀}) := by
      apply sSup_le; intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨M₁, hM₁, hyM₁⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hMN : M₁ = N₀
      · have : y ∈ B N₀ hN₀ := by
          have heq : B M₁ hM₁ = B N₀ hN₀ := by subst hMN; congr 1
          rwa [heq] at hyM₁
        exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨this, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hM₁, hMN⟩
          (by rw [hB M₁ hM₁]; exact le_sSup hyM₁))
    have haN₀ : a ≤ N₀ := le_trans ha hxN₀
    have ha_pq : a ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N₀}) := le_trans ha' hle
    have hpN₀ : sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ≤ N₀ := by
      apply sSup_le; intro y hy; rw [hB N₀ hN₀]; exact le_sSup hy.1
    have hdisj : Disjoint N₀ (sSup (↑D \ {N₀})) := D.sSupIndep' hN₀
    have ha_p : a ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) := by
      calc a ≤ (sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N₀})) ⊓ N₀ :=
                le_inf ha_pq haN₀
        _ ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N₀}) ⊓ N₀ :=
                IsModularLattice.sup_inf_le_assoc_of_le _ hpN₀
        _ ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ ⊥ :=
                sup_le_sup_left ((disjoint_comm.mp hdisj).le_bot) _
        _ ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) := by simp
    have hdisj_x : Disjoint x (sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x})) :=
      (hB' N₀ hN₀).disjoint_sSup hx_mem Set.diff_subset (fun h => h.2 rfl)
    exact le_trans (le_inf ha ha_p) hdisj_x.le_bot
successful_attempts:
haveI : IsModularLattice (∀ i : C, Submodule K (M.obj i)) :=
      ⟨fun {x} y {z} (h : x ≤ z) (i : C) =>
        IsModularLattice.sup_inf_le_assoc_of_le (y i) (h i)⟩
    haveI : IsModularLattice (PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
      constructor; intro x y z h
      change ⇑((x ⊔ y) ⊓ z) ≤ ⇑(x ⊔ y ⊓ z)
      simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.coe_sup, PersistenceSubmodule.coe_inf]
      exact IsModularLattice.sup_inf_le_assoc_of_le (⇑y) h
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N₀, hN₀, hx_mem⟩ := hx
    have hxN₀ : x ≤ N₀ := by rw [hB N₀ hN₀]; exact le_sSup hx_mem
    have hle : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤
        sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N₀}) := by
      apply sSup_le; intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨M₁, hM₁, hyM₁⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hMN : M₁ = N₀
      · have : y ∈ B N₀ hN₀ := by
          have heq : B M₁ hM₁ = B N₀ hN₀ := by subst hMN; congr 1
          rwa [heq] at hyM₁
        exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨this, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hM₁, hMN⟩
          (by rw [hB M₁ hM₁]; exact le_sSup hyM₁))
    have haN₀ : a ≤ N₀ := le_trans ha hxN₀
    have ha_pq : a ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N₀}) := le_trans ha' hle
    have hpN₀ : sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ≤ N₀ := by
      apply sSup_le; intro y hy; rw [hB N₀ hN₀]; exact le_sSup hy.1
    have hdisj : Disjoint N₀ (sSup (↑D \ {N₀})) := D.sSupIndep' hN₀
    have ha_p : a ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) := by
      calc a ≤ (sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N₀})) ⊓ N₀ :=
                le_inf ha_pq haN₀
        _ ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N₀}) ⊓ N₀ :=
                IsModularLattice.sup_inf_le_assoc_of_le _ hpN₀
        _ ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ ⊥ :=
                sup_le_sup_left ((disjoint_comm.mp hdisj).le_bot) _
        _ ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) := by simp
    have hdisj_x : Disjoint x (sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x})) :=
      (hB' N₀ hN₀).disjoint_sSup hx_mem Set.diff_subset (fun h => h.2 rfl)
    exact le_trans (le_inf ha ha_p) hdisj_x.le_bot
